question.zh: 我的基地缺矿工，应该用哪个帕鲁？
question.en: What is the best Pal for mining?

heroDescription.zh: 采矿是基地自动化最关键的环节。选对采矿帕鲁，矿石和金属锭的产量能差 3-5 倍。以下排名综合考虑了采矿等级、工作效率、移动速度和获取难度。
heroDescription.en: Mining is the most critical part of base automation. The right mining Pal can increase your ore and ingot output by 3-5x. This ranking considers mining level, work efficiency, movement speed, and accessibility.

seo.title: Best Mining Pals in Palworld 2026 — Palworld Mining Tier List
seo.description: Ranked list of the best Pals for mining in Palworld 1.0. Compare mining levels, efficiency, and how to get each Pal — from early game to endgame.
